checklist.label: Read packet.inputEvidence.phase2.pageMatrix, pageMatrixStrategy, and requiredCroBlocks before editing site files; routesGenerated must prove the approved internal matrix.
Read packet.inputEvidence.phase3.designSystem.path, especially Phase 4 Build Notes, before editing site files.
Apply packet.inputEvidence.phase3.identityDecision exactly; do not invent domain, email, GA, payment, or canonical metadata.
When packet.inputEvidence.phase3.designTokenExport exists, apply that repo-owned token export and preserve designTokenSource, designTokenExportPath, and designTokenHash in the Phase 4 artifact.
Read the resolved specialist SKILL.md before authoring phase work.
Fill the scaffolded phase artifact with contract-compliant evidence.
Run inspect-artifact before complete-phase and fix reported weaknesses.
Require reviewer notes to travel by --notes-file.

pageMatrixStrategy.model: Restaurant single-location depth: menu-category x occasion x search-intent families, with a genuine-fact neighborhood ring and a GEO truth-assertion page
pageFamilies: Search-intent root landings (8: dish + near-me + soul-food + late-night + catering)
pageMatrixStrategy.crossLinkPlan: Menu sections <-> related occasions <-> matching intent landings; /catering-cedar-rapids <-> /occasions/office-and-party-catering (intent vs occasion framing); /open-late-cedar-rapids -> menu hub + near-me; /location -> contact + about + FAQ (disambiguation cluster); neighborhoods -> menu hub + nearest intent landing; home -> menu hub + top occasions + top intents. Occasions >=4 cross-links, intent landings >=2.
pageMatrixStrategy.sapNote: No service-area SAP pages. A SW-quadrant neighborhood page was considered (research: SW flank lost to rivals) and REJECTED — no genuine local facts beyond city-wide app delivery = doorway risk. SW delivery reach is copy on /fish-and-chicken-near-me instead.

imageSlotPlan.purpose: REUSE: 87 menu-item renders + occasion/marketing heroes + og + logo produced in the archived run remain valid for the unchanged menu (same items/prices); Phase 6 re-verifies manifest/selections/exports against this run rather than regenerating (~186 credits saved)
NEW if needed: evening storefront-glow illustration for /open-late-cedar-rapids (representational; or text-hero)
OWNER FILE DROP still pending at public/logo.png (shark-captain emblem); raster placeholder in place
OPEN: owner photos to replace representational renders when supplied

requiredCroBlocks.note: Restaurant archetype carries no auto-dealer CRO block contract (croContractFor('restaurant',...) === null). Restaurant conversion elements planned per kind; call-only exception applies site-wide (owner decision, Phase 0 sealed).
home: hero + single call CTA + 3 value-props strip
style rule: matches interior pages (left h2s, white steel-bordered cards, navy shell-only, gold CTAs-only)
contact: NAP + map + hours + directions + call CTA
documentedExceptions: lead-form OMITTED site-wide (no endpoint; owner call-only decision)
dual-CTA reduced to single call CTA (no SMS line)
trust content as 'why choose us' copy, not the auto-dealer 6-fact grid

phase2.minimumPageCountRationale: 38 internal routes (>=25, <500): 1 home + 1 menu hub + 14 menu sections (owner-confirmed) + 6 occasions + 8 intent landings (6 carried + open-late + catering from Phase 1 quick wins) + 4 info/faq/story landings + 1 location truth page + 2 neighborhoods + 1 contact. Every addition traces to a sealed Phase 1 finding: late-night gap, catering SERP gap, and the two-location disambiguation need. External ordering links are CTAs (externalCount 0). If either neighborhood's facts fail at authoring the count drops to 36-37, still above floor.

pageMatrix.title: Captains Fish and Chicken — Fresh Fish, Chicken & Seafood in Cedar Rapids

pageMatrix.note: Gazette-reported additions (mashed potatoes, mac and cheese) held OUT pending owner confirmation
Phase 1: fish-fry SERP is bar/event-dominated with NO takeout player — strengthen year-round takeout angle; KHAK Lent roundup pitch noted for launch checklist
Phase 1: Captains already leads Yelp catfish list; Gazette quote citable with attribution
fried-basket lane vs boil houses (Crab House, Juicy Crab Island)
field refilled (I'm Soul Hungry, Iowa Soul Food Market) — sharpen fish+chicken+soul-food breadth angle
carries city-wide delivery-reach copy incl. SW quadrant (apps deliver city-wide)
NEW (Phase 1 quick win): open to 10pm weeknights/11pm Fri-Sat yet absent from late-night roundups; copy caveats hours with call-to-confirm
NEW (Phase 1 quick win): 'fried chicken catering cedar rapids' + 'party pans' SERP open — only Popeyes-via-ezCater ranks; cross-links the catering occasion
owner story: Ray Aqel, Chicago restaurants since 2006 (Gazette-attributed), opened Oct 2024
adds disambiguation FAQs: 'Is the 6th St SW Captains still open?' (no — now Pita Kabab, same owner); 'Is Captains the same as Pita Kabab?'
cornmeal breading + lemon pepper (Gazette-attributed press quotes)

NEW (GEO truth assertion): ONE location — 1616 1st Ave NE; explicit dated statement that 3100 6th St SW closed as Captains and is now Pita Kabab; map, directions, parking; counters stale two-location signals AI engines currently ingest
Mound View / Wellington Heights / Coe College / I-380 — genuine facts re-validated
~5 mi via Hwy 100/7th Ave; app delivery reach

designSystem.query: modern nautical navy + gold fast-casual fish & chicken takeout — derived from the owner-supplied Captains shark-captain logo; sticky navy nav, gold conversion CTAs, image-overlay heroes, card-grid menu; home page visually identical in language to interior pages (left-aligned h2s, white steel-bordered cards, navy shell-only, gold CTAs-only)
designSystem.stack: Astro 6 static SSG + LocalEvolve restaurant archetype + engine-floor Base.astro layout + shared components + vanilla CSS custom-property design tokens

steps: Author data collections from sealed inputs: business.json (NAP, conservative structured hours Mon-Thu+Sun, caveated displayText, navy/gold brand, fixture gaId/domain/email, servesCuisine + priceRange), site.json (nav/footer w/ trailing slashes incl. the orphan-fix links + new pages, call-only ctaPrimary, 3 fact-based valueProps, ctaBanner), menu.json (owner paste exactly — sides delta held), occasions.json (6, floors met), landings.json (10 -> 12: adds open-late-cedar-rapids [intent], catering-cedar-rapids [intent], location [info]; faq gains disambiguation Qs), neighborhoods.json (2; Marion facts independently substantiated or fold).

Author Business Knowledge Graph: src/graph menu(14)/occasions(6)/facts(6: hours, phone, address, serves-cuisine, price-range, year-established) nodes, ALL provenance KNOW; factory graph-seed for Q&A; wire runs graph-mode.

Project-local component layer (relative imports, NOT @engine aliases): Base.astro (tokens + global CSS), Header (navy sticky + logo + gold CTA; mobile static), Footer (navy columns), Hero (overlay/image/video variants, CRO-marker compatible).
Build the exact 38 approved routes; verify routesGenerated matches packet.inputEvidence.phase2.pageMatrix (new Phase 4 gate).

Emit JSON-LD: Restaurant (servesCuisine/priceRange/hasMenu via graph projection) + WebSite site-wide; Menu (87 priced items) on /menu; FAQPage on FAQ-bearing pages; BreadcrumbList on non-home; Speakable on every WebPage block.

Authoring constraints (binding): plan-wide calamari ban; no uncaveated hours in titles; no dine-in claims; SW address only as disambiguation content; representational-image notes; hours caveat everywhere.

contentSourceMap.menu: run-v2 brief owner paste (held sides delta)

selectedArchitecture.graph: src/graph Business Knowledge Graph (menu/occasions/facts, KNOW provenance) + graph-seeded Q&A — wire graph-mode
selectedArchitecture.componentChannel: project-local Base/Header/Footer/Hero via relative imports (engine @engine aliases do not honor shadows)
selectedArchitecture.conversion: call-only (tel:) + external ordering CTAs; no lead form, no SMS (documented exception)
selectedArchitecture.figma: none — repo-owned CSS tokens only (optional Figma fields intentionally omitted)

assetNeeds.brief: REUSE archived-run renders: 87 menu items (slugify-keyed) + heroes + og; representational
text-hero at build; optional evening representational render at Phase 6
OWNER FILE DROP pending at public/logo.png (shark-captain emblem); raster placeholder in place
OPEN: owner photos replace representational renders when supplied

identityDecision.rationale: AMENDED 2026-07-08: owner supplied real values (Netlify subdomain now; custom domain can follow), real GA4 property, and a live business inbox. Fixtures fully retired; factory validate exits 0. paymentAccepted still unknown -> omitted from JSON-LD.

stopCondition: Stop after producing exactly one inspected phase artifact; do not continue to the next phase in the same invocation.
